parameters.jsCode:
// Build loop Job YAML with task-specific substitutions.
const t = $json;
const intentEsc = t.intent.replace(/"/g, '\\"').replace(/\n/g, ' ').substring(0, 500);
const jobYaml = [
  'apiVersion: batch/v1',
  'kind: Job',
  'metadata:',
  `  name: loop-${t.task_id}`,
  '  namespace: ai',
  '  labels:',
  '    app.kubernetes.io/name: goose-runner',
  '    loop.68cc.io/engine: goose',
  `    loop.68cc.io/task: "${t.task_id}"`,
  'spec:',
  '  backoffLimit: 0',
  '  activeDeadlineSeconds: 1800',
  '  ttlSecondsAfterFinished: 7200',
  '  template:',
  '    metadata:',
  '      labels:',
  '        app.kubernetes.io/name: goose-runner',
  '        loop.68cc.io/engine: goose',
  `        loop.68cc.io/task: "${t.task_id}"`,
  '    spec:',
  '      restartPolicy: Never',
  '      securityContext:',
  '        runAsUser: 1000',
  '        runAsGroup: 1000',
  '        runAsNonRoot: true',
  '        fsGroup: 1000',
  '        seccompProfile:',
  '          type: RuntimeDefault',
  '      initContainers:',
  '        - name: clone',
  '          image: ghcr.io/block/goose:latest',
  '          securityContext:',
  '            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false',
  '            capabilities:',
  '              drop: ["ALL"]',
  '          envFrom:',
  '            - secretRef:',
  '                name: goose-runner-secrets',
  '          env:',
  `            - name: WORK_BRANCH`,
  `              value: "${t.work_branch}"`,
  '            - name: REPO_REF',
  `              value: "${t.ref}"`,
  '          command: ["/bin/sh", "-c"]',
  '          args:',
  '            - |',
  '              set -eu',
  '              git config --global --add safe.directory /workspace/home-ops',
  '              git clone --depth 1 "https://${GITHUB_TOKEN}@github.com/j0sh3rs/home-ops.git" /workspace/home-ops',
  '              git -C /workspace/home-ops config user.name j0sh3rs',
  '              git -C /workspace/home-ops config user.email j0sh3rs@gmail.com',
  '              git -C /workspace/home-ops checkout "${REPO_REF}"',
  '              git -C /workspace/home-ops switch -c "${WORK_BRANCH}"',
  '          volumeMounts:',
  '            - name: workspace',
  '              mountPath: /workspace',
  '        - name: rag',
  '          image: ghcr.io/block/goose:latest',
  '          securityContext:',
  '            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false',
  '            capabilities:',
  '              drop: ["ALL"]',
  '          envFrom:',
  '            - secretRef:',
  '                name: goose-runner-secrets',
  '            - secretRef:',
  '                name: goose-indexer-secrets',
  '          env:',
  '            - name: REPO_DIR',
  '              value: /workspace/home-ops',
  '            - name: CONTEXT_OUT',
  '              value: /workspace/rag-context.txt',
  '            - name: LITELLM_HOST',
  '              value: http://litellm.ai.svc.cluster.local:4000',
  '            - name: LITELLM_API_KEY',
  '              valueFrom:',
  '                secretKeyRef:',
  '                  name: goose-runner-secrets',
  '                  key: OPENAI_API_KEY',
  '            - name: TOP_K',
  '              value: "3"',
  '            - name: TASK_TEXT',
  `              value: "${intentEsc}"`,
  '          command: ["/bin/sh", "-c", "chmod +x /rag/grep-harness.sh && /rag/grep-harness.sh"]',
  '          volumeMounts:',
  '            - name: workspace',
  '              mountPath: /workspace',
  '            - name: rag-harness',
  '              mountPath: /rag',
  '              readOnly: true',
  '      containers:',
  '        - name: runner',
  '          image: ghcr.io/block/goose:latest',
  '          workingDir: /workspace/home-ops',
  '          securityContext:',
  '            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false',
  '            capabilities:',
  '              drop: ["ALL"]',
  '          envFrom:',
  '            - secretRef:',
  '                name: goose-runner-secrets',
  '          env:',
  '            - name: GOOSE_PATH_ROOT',
  '              value: /tmp/goose',
  '            - name: GOOSE_DISABLE_KEYRING',
  '              value: "1"',
  '            - name: GOOSE_PROVIDER',
  '              value: litellm',
  '            - name: GOOSE_MODEL',
  '              value: cloud-sonnet',
  '            - name: LITELLM_HOST',
  '              value: http://litellm.ai.svc.cluster.local:4000',
  '            - name: LITELLM_API_KEY',
  '              valueFrom:',
  '                secretKeyRef:',
  '                  name: goose-runner-secrets',
  '                  key: OPENAI_API_KEY',
  '            - name: LANGFUSE_URL',
  '              value: http://langfuse-web.ai.svc.cluster.local:3000',
  '            - name: TASK_TEXT',
  `              value: "${intentEsc}"`,
  '            - name: WORK_BRANCH',
  `              value: "${t.work_branch}"`,
  '          command: ["/bin/sh", "-c"]',
  '          args:',
  '            - |',
  '              set -eu',
  '              RAG=$(cat /workspace/rag-context.txt 2>/dev/null || true)',
  '              STATUS=failed; DIFF=""',
  '              set +e',
  '              LOG=$(goose run --no-session --with-builtin developer --system "${RAG}" --text "${TASK_TEXT}" 2>&1)',
  '              RC=$?; set -e',
  '              if [ $RC -eq 0 ]; then',
  '                CHANGED=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null || true)',
  '                VALID=true; VOUT=""',
  '                for f in $CHANGED; do',
  '                  D=$(dirname "/workspace/home-ops/${f}")',
  '                  if [ -f "${D}/kustomization.yaml" ]; then',
  '                    OUT=$(kustomize build "${D}" 2>&1) || { VOUT="${VOUT}FAIL ${D}\n"; VALID=false; }',
  '                  fi',
  '                done',
  '                if $VALID && [ -n "$CHANGED" ]; then',
  '                  git add -A',
  '                  git commit -m "loop: $(echo \"${TASK_TEXT}\" | head -c 60)"',
  '                  git push "https://${GITHUB_TOKEN}@github.com/j0sh3rs/home-ops.git" "${WORK_BRANCH}"',
  '                  DIFF=$(git --no-pager diff HEAD~1 --stat 2>/dev/null || true)',
  '                  STATUS=success',
  '                elif $VALID; then STATUS=no_changes',
  '                else LOG="${LOG}${VOUT}"; STATUS=validate_failed; fi',
  '              fi',
  '              python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.dumps({',
  '                  \'task_id\':\'${WORK_BRANCH}\'.replace(\'loop/\',\'\'),',
  '                  \'status\':\'${STATUS}\',\'branch\':\'${WORK_BRANCH}\',',
  '                  \'diff\':sys.argv[1][:2000],\'log\':sys.argv[2][:4000]}))" "$DIFF" "$LOG" > /workspace/output.json',
  '              cat /workspace/output.json',
  '          resources:',
  '            requests:',
  '              cpu: 500m',
  '              memory: 512Mi',
  '            limits:',
  '              cpu: "2"',
  '              memory: 2Gi',
  '          volumeMounts:',
  '            - name: workspace',
  '              mountPath: /workspace',
  '            - name: rag-harness',
  '              mountPath: /rag',
  '              readOnly: true',
  '      volumes:',
  '        - name: workspace',
  '          emptyDir: {}',
  '        - name: rag-harness',
  '          configMap:',
  '            name: goose-rag-harness',
  '            defaultMode: 0555',
].join('\n');
return [{ json: { ...t, job_yaml: jobYaml } }];

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "title": "loop: {{ $json.title }}",
  "body": "## Automated loop task

**Task:** {{ $json.intent }}

**Triage risk:** `{{ $json.triage.risk }}`

**Diff:**
```
{{ $json.output.diff }}
```

---
*Goose loop engine · task `{{ $json.task_id }}` · branch `{{ $json.work_branch }}`*",
  "head": "{{ $json.work_branch }}",
  "base": "{{ $json.ref }}",
  "draft": false
}
